overview: Learning how to master writing in academia can be difficult for new writers.
However, it is an important skill for funding, designing, developing, implementing, and reporting on innovative engineering projects, technologies, and research.
ECoS is a technical writing solution that can be used to help writers with document collaboration and learning complex expectations of professional writing.
For more information, visit the ECoS website.
longTermGoals: We want to create new features for both our website and Microsoft Add-in to make ECoS easy and efficient.
We want to extend our services into Google Docs by creating a Google extension.
We want to make the use of our backend as efficient as possible.
We are also looking for business-oriented students to help with expanding the use of ECoS.
quickPoints: ECoS creates a flexible way of maintaining and creating your own comment libraries.
Our website and add-in are created using React.
ECoS runs using AWS with Spring Boot.
